operations-workspace-all-phases (194 physical files, 191 manifest entries, MIGRATION_MANIFEST.json SHA-256 7e900e85460061064d56818071c31486def91ce5c84784ec92a2d194a6b86b90, independently verified this round) is a reviewed design input only, per ADR-OW-004. It proposes renaming shift-operations-workspace to operations-workspace, which ADR-OW-001 already rejected; none of its content is imported, adopted, or treated as runtime/continuity evidence by this round.

Delta-accounting failure history, preserved in full (do not erase any stage): (1) the round's opening estimate was 25-path old baseline / 21 unchanged / 4 changed / 169 new, superseded because it omitted scripts/migration/README.md from the changed set; (2) the first correction was 26 / 21 / 5 / 168, accepted by Codex as an RM1-R1 reviewer amendment, but superseded because it compared the old baseline (with __pycache__ excluded) against the full bundle (with __pycache__ still included) -- an asymmetric comparison, not an input change; (3) repair round 2 (RM1-R3, finding ASYMMETRIC_CACHE_FILTER_INVALID_DELTA) independently re-derived the delta with __pycache__ excluded symmetrically from both inputs and found 182 full-bundle non-cache paths, giving 26 / 21 unchanged / 5 changed / 156 new / 161 total disposition candidates -- withdrew the 168 figure specifically (RM1-R1's separate finding that a worker may not self-classify a triggered stop condition remains closed and unaffected) -- and accepted 26/21/5/156/161 as the current authoritative baseline. This was recorded as a comparison-method defect (BLOCKED_EVIDENCE_METHOD), not input drift: neither input's content changed at any stage. See ADR-OW-004's 'Delta accounting -- full failure history (RM1-R1, RM1-R3)' section.

Integrity facts (unchanged, re-confirmed in repair round 2): 194 physical files, 191 manifest entries (MIGRATION_MANIFEST.json does not list itself in its own files array), 12 total .pyc files of which 10 are manifest-listed and 2 are not -- manifest membership does not make a generated binary source; all 12 are excluded from candidacy.

Repair round 1 also closed RM1-R2: OW-RM1-WO-001 previously claimed the C3 independent review receipt was covered by an undefined docs/reviews/** wildcard. A separate Codex-owned C3 closure ceiling is now defined (docs/reviews/RM1_INDEPENDENT_REVIEW_2026-07-23.md, IMPLEMENTATION_STATUS.json, CVF_SESSION/ACTIVE_SESSION_STATE.json, CVF_SESSION/handoffs/AGENT_HANDOFF_V1_2026-07-23.md); IMPLEMENTATION_WORKER may not author or modify the independent review receipt under any circumstance.
